text: meaning_trace_v1 tracks signals, interpretation, decision, and outcome per tick.
ACTION_ERROR_ECHO_MAP maps tool error results into world-facing interpreted echo strings.
plutchik_affect_enabled toggles interpreted affect overlays while raw world data stays separate.
abstain_on_unanswerable_rate measures how often the model declines to invent answers for unknown prompts.
abstain_on_answerable_rate should be low to avoid unnecessary refusal on questions that are answerable.
source attribution uses three streams: world_field_stream, nethaq_overlay, and user_message_stream.
